description_long: This is an ornate ring featuring a large, deep blue faceted gemstone as its centerpiece, set in a dark metallic band. The band is encrusted with a row of clear, round gemstones on both sides, extending from the top setting down toward the shank. The upper gallery beneath the main stone is accented with additional blue stones, adding a touch of color and complexity to the design. The band itself is relatively thick and robust, providing a strong base for the elaborate setting. The overall style is luxurious and eye-catching, with a strong emphasis on symmetry and sparkle. The combination of blue and clear stones against the dark metal creates a striking contrast, making this piece stand out in any urban environment.
description: A luxurious ring with a large blue gemstone centerpiece, surrounded by clear stones on a dark metal band. The design is ornate and highly decorative, with striking color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large blue gemstone and rows of clear stones along the band, with blue accent stones visible beneath the main setting.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the band and the profile of the blue gemstone, with the clear stones encircling the upper band.
description_view_2: Rear front view mirrors the front, again showcasing the blue centerpiece and the symmetrical arrangement of clear stones.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the band’s width and the gemstone’s raised setting.
